title: A Hitler Bunker Faces Demolition in Housing-Challenged Berlin
summary_full: Preservation experts say the move to develop the site reflects a tension in Germany between the need to preserve historically significant monuments and the need to build and modernize.
summary_public: Preservation experts say the move to develop the site reflects a tension in Germany between the need to preserve historically significant monuments and the need to build and modernize.
